requirement_topic.en: Import Conformity Inspection — IANORQ Regulated-Product Control at Entry (Luanda, Lobito)
requirement_topic.zh: 进口符合性查验——IANORQ受管制产品入境管控（罗安达、洛比托）
requirement_topic.zht: 進口符合性查驗——IANORQ受管制產品入境管控（羅安達、洛比托）

summary.en: Angola does not use a single CE-style self-declaration mark. Instead, regulated imported products are controlled at the point of entry through an import conformity-inspection process supervised by IANORQ (the national standardization and quality institute), in coordination with customs at the main ports of Luanda and Lobito. For a regulated electrical appliance such as a household refrigerator, the importer typically must present conformity evidence (test reports / certificates against the applicable Angolan national standard NA, which adopts IEC 60335-2-24), commercial and shipping documents, and product information in Portuguese, so the consignment can be verified and released. The recognised technical evidence is IEC-based — an IECEE CB Scheme certificate and report covering IEC 60335-2-24 (and IEC 60335-1) is the cleanest demonstration. The in-country importer of record carries the inspection file and is the responsible party for the goods on the Angolan market.
summary.zh: 安哥拉不使用单一CE式自我声明标志。相反，受管制进口产品在入境口岸通过由IANORQ（国家标准化与质量研究所）监督、与罗安达和洛比托主要口岸海关协同的进口符合性查验程序进行管控。对于家用电冰箱等受管制电气器具，进口商通常须提交符合性证据（针对适用安哥拉国家标准NA的检测报告/证书，NA采纳IEC 60335-2-24）、商业及运输单据，以及葡萄牙语产品信息，以便对该批货物进行核验和放行。受认可的技术证据基于IEC——涵盖IEC 60335-2-24（及IEC 60335-1）的IECEE CB体系证书及报告为最清晰的证明。在地进口记录方持有查验档案，为货物在安哥拉市场的责任方。
summary.zht: 安哥拉不使用單一CE式自我聲明標誌。相反，受管制進口產品在入境口岸通過由IANORQ（國家標準化與質量研究所）監督、與羅安達和洛比托主要口岸海關協同的進口符合性查驗程序進行管控。對於家用電冰箱等受管制電氣器具，進口商通常須提交符合性證據（針對適用安哥拉國家標準NA的檢測報告/證書，NA採納IEC 60335-2-24）、商業及運輸單據，以及葡萄牙語產品資訊，以便對該批貨物進行核驗和放行。受認可的技術證據基於IEC——涵蓋IEC 60335-2-24（及IEC 60335-1）的IECEE CB體系證書及報告為最清晰的證明。在地進口記錄方持有查驗檔案，為貨物在安哥拉市場的責任方。

standards_or_laws: IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade) — supervises import conformity inspection for regulated products at entry
Angola customs / import control at ports of Luanda and Lobito — coordinated release of regulated consignments
IECEE CB Scheme certificate + report (IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1) — recognised conformity evidence for inspection (confirm acceptance with IANORQ and importer)

summary.en: China controls domestic-market refrigerators through China Compulsory Certification (CCC), a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1), plus the separately administered China Energy Label (GB 12021.2). CCC is a pre-market product certification, not a per-shipment border inspection: once certified, products bear the CCC mark and may be sold domestically. This differs structurally from Angola's model, where control is exercised through conformity inspection of the imported consignment at entry rather than a domestic pre-market mark. A Chinese CCC certificate is not, by itself, the document the Angolan importer presents at inspection.
summary.zh: 中国通过中国强制认证（CCC）管控国内市场电冰箱，CCC为由CNCA指定认证机构审核的强制性第三方认证，涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1），另加单独管理的中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为市场前产品认证，而非逐批边境查验：一经认证，产品加贴CCC标志即可在国内销售。这与安哥拉模式在结构上不同——安哥拉通过对进口货物入境时的符合性查验实施管控，而非国内市场前标志。中国CCC证书本身并非安哥拉进口商在查验时所提交的文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過中國強制認證（CCC）管控國內市場電冰箱，CCC為由CNCA指定認證機構審核的強制性第三方認證，涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1），另加單獨管理的中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為市場前產品認證，而非逐批邊境查驗：一經認證，產品加貼CCC標誌即可在國內銷售。這與安哥拉模式在結構上不同——安哥拉通過對進口貨物入境時的符合性查驗實施管控，而非國內市場前標誌。中國CCC證書本身並非安哥拉進口商在查驗時所提交的文件。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory pre-market product certification administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — based on GB 12021.2-2015 (separate energy requirement)

gap.en: The structural gap is the control model: China relies on a pre-market CCC mark, while Angola relies on import conformity inspection of the consignment at entry. Practical consequences: (1) Evidence packaging — the Chinese exporter should supply the importer with IEC-based conformity evidence (preferably an IECEE CB Scheme certificate + report against IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1) rather than only the CCC certificate, which references GB numbers and is not the inspection document; (2) Importer of record — a legally established Angolan importer must be in place to receive the goods, hold the inspection file, and be the responsible party; there is no exporter self-declaration route that bypasses this; (3) Port logistics — clearance occurs at Luanda or Lobito under IANORQ-supervised inspection, so lead time and document completeness (Portuguese product information, commercial invoice, packing list, conformity evidence) directly affect release; (4) Scheme specifics — the exact inspection scheme, any pre-shipment verification of conformity (PVoC-type) requirement, and applicable NA references should be confirmed with IANORQ and the importer before shipping, because these can change and may be applied per product category.
gap.zh: 结构性差距在于管控模式：中国依赖市场前CCC标志，而安哥拉依赖货物入境时的进口符合性查验。实际影响：（1）证据组织——中国出口商应向进口商提供基于IEC的符合性证据（最好为针对IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1的IECEE CB体系证书+报告），而非仅提供引用GB编号、并非查验文件的CCC证书；（2）进口记录方——须有合法设立的安哥拉进口商接收货物、持有查验档案并作为责任方；不存在绕过此环节的出口商自我声明路径；（3）口岸物流——清关在罗安达或洛比托口岸由IANORQ监督查验进行，因此交付周期及文件完整性（葡萄牙语产品信息、商业发票、装箱单、符合性证据）直接影响放行；（4）方案细节——具体查验方案、任何装运前符合性验证（PVoC类）要求及适用NA引用，应在装运前向IANORQ及进口商确认，因为这些可能变动并可能按产品类别适用。
gap.zht: 結構性差距在於管控模式：中國依賴市場前CCC標誌，而安哥拉依賴貨物入境時的進口符合性查驗。實際影響：（1）證據組織——中國出口商應向進口商提供基於IEC的符合性證據（最好為針對IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1的IECEE CB體系證書+報告），而非僅提供引用GB編號、並非查驗文件的CCC證書；（2）進口記錄方——須有合法設立的安哥拉進口商接收貨物、持有查驗檔案並作為責任方；不存在繞過此環節的出口商自我聲明路徑；（3）口岸物流——清關在羅安達或洛比托口岸由IANORQ監督查驗進行，因此交付週期及文件完整性（葡萄牙語產品資訊、商業發票、裝箱單、符合性證據）直接影響放行；（4）方案細節——具體查驗方案、任何裝運前符合性驗證（PVoC類）要求及適用NA引用，應在裝運前向IANORQ及進口商確認，因為這些可能變動並可能按產品類別適用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in effect — regulated electrical appliances undergo IANORQ-supervised import conformity inspection at entry (Luanda, Lobito); an in-country importer of record and IEC-based conformity evidence are required for release
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC pre-market certification (safety + EMC) required before sale in China; China Energy Label separately required

source.publisher: IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade) — Angola standards/quality body (ISO member profile); import-inspection scheme to confirm with IANORQ and importer

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Angola controls regulated appliances through IANORQ-supervised import conformity inspection at entry (Luanda, Lobito), not a CE-style self-declaration mark. Chinese CCC is a pre-market mark and is not the inspection document — supply the importer with IEC-based evidence (ideally an IECEE CB Scheme certificate/report against IEC 60335-2-24). A legally established Angolan importer of record is mandatory. Confirm the exact inspection scheme and any pre-shipment verification requirement with IANORQ and the importer before shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安哥拉通过IANORQ监督的入境进口符合性查验（罗安达、洛比托）管控受管制器具，而非CE式自我声明标志。中国CCC为市场前标志，并非查验文件——应向进口商提供基于IEC的证据（最好为针对IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB体系证书/报告）。须有合法设立的安哥拉进口记录方。装运前请向IANORQ及进口商确认具体查验方案及任何装运前验证要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安哥拉通過IANORQ監督的入境進口符合性查驗（羅安達、洛比托）管控受管制器具，而非CE式自我聲明標誌。中國CCC為市場前標誌，並非查驗文件——應向進口商提供基於IEC的證據（最好為針對IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB體系證書/報告）。須有合法設立的安哥拉進口記錄方。裝運前請向IANORQ及進口商確認具體查驗方案及任何裝運前驗證要求。

requirement_topic.en: Importer of Record and Absence of EU-Style Horizontal Regimes (RoHS / Battery / Outdoor Noise)
requirement_topic.zh: 进口记录方与无欧盟式横向制度（RoHS/电池/户外噪声）
requirement_topic.zht: 進口記錄方與無歐盟式橫向制度（RoHS/電池/戶外噪聲）

summary.en: Two market-access realities distinguish Angola from the EU. First, an in-country importer of record is required: products are placed on the Angolan market through a legally established Angolan importer who receives the goods, holds the import conformity-inspection and product-information file in Portuguese, and acts as the responsible economic operator domestically. There is no exporter self-declaration route equivalent to affixing a CE mark from abroad, and there is no EU EPREL-style central product registry. Second, Angola does not operate the EU's horizontal environmental/product directives for this product class: there is no Angolan equivalent of the EU RoHS substance-restriction directive, no EU-style batteries regulation regime, and no EU-style outdoor-noise (environmental noise emission) directive applied to household refrigerators. Where such concerns arise, they are addressed (if at all) through the applicable IEC-based national standard and general safety/quality oversight, not a standalone horizontal regime.
summary.zh: 两项市场准入现实使安哥拉区别于欧盟。第一，须有在地进口记录方：产品通过合法设立的安哥拉进口商投放安哥拉市场，由其接收货物、以葡萄牙语持有进口符合性查验及产品信息档案，并在国内作为责任经济运营商。不存在等同于在境外加贴CE标志的出口商自我声明路径，也无欧盟EPREL式中央产品注册库。第二，安哥拉不针对该产品类别实行欧盟横向环境/产品指令：无与欧盟RoHS物质限制指令等同的安哥拉规定，无欧盟式电池法规制度，也无适用于家用电冰箱的欧盟式户外噪声（环境噪声排放）指令。如出现此类问题，则（如有）通过适用的基于IEC的国家标准及一般安全/质量监督处理，而非独立横向制度。
summary.zht: 兩項市場准入現實使安哥拉區別於歐盟。第一，須有在地進口記錄方：產品通過合法設立的安哥拉進口商投放安哥拉市場，由其接收貨物、以葡萄牙語持有進口符合性查驗及產品資訊檔案，並在國內作為責任經濟運營商。不存在等同於在境外加貼CE標誌的出口商自我聲明路徑，也無歐盟EPREL式中央產品註冊庫。第二，安哥拉不針對該產品類別實行歐盟橫向環境/產品指令：無與歐盟RoHS物質限制指令等同的安哥拉規定，無歐盟式電池法規制度，也無適用於家用電冰箱的歐盟式戶外噪聲（環境噪聲排放）指令。如出現此類問題，則（如有）通過適用的基於IEC的國家標準及一般安全/質量監督處理，而非獨立橫向制度。

standards_or_laws: Angola importer-of-record requirement — legally established in-country importer holds the conformity-inspection/product-information file and is the responsible operator (no foreign exporter self-declaration route; no EPREL-style registry)
No Angolan equivalent to EU RoHS (Directive 2011/65/EU) — no standalone hazardous-substance restriction regime for this product class
No Angolan equivalent to EU Batteries Regulation or EU Outdoor Noise Directive (2000/14/EC) for household refrigerators

summary.en: China itself operates horizontal-style regimes that partly parallel the EU's: China RoHS (Administrative Measures on the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products, plus GB/T 26572 limits and the GB/T 39560 test series), with marking and the Hazardous Substances Disclosure Table; battery rules; and energy/quality oversight. The CCC holder or domestic manufacturer is the responsible party for the Chinese market. None of these Chinese horizontal obligations create an Angolan obligation, and conversely Angola does not impose an equivalent set on the imported refrigerator — so the exporter's existing China RoHS work is not a required input for Angolan market access (though good substance control remains commercially useful).
summary.zh: 中国本身实行部分与欧盟平行的横向式制度：中国RoHS（电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法，及GB/T 26572限值与GB/T 39560测试系列），含标识与有害物质披露表；电池规定；及能效/质量监督。CCC持有人或国内制造商为中国市场的责任方。这些中国横向义务均不产生安哥拉义务，反之安哥拉也不对进口电冰箱施加等同的一套——因此出口商既有的中国RoHS工作并非安哥拉市场准入的必需输入（尽管良好的物质管控在商业上仍有用）。
summary.zht: 中國本身實行部分與歐盟平行的橫向式制度：中國RoHS（電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法，及GB/T 26572限值與GB/T 39560測試系列），含標識與有害物質披露表；電池規定；及能效/質量監督。CCC持有人或國內製造商為中國市場的責任方。這些中國橫向義務均不產生安哥拉義務，反之安哥拉也不對進口電冰箱施加等同的一套——因此出口商既有的中國RoHS工作並非安哥拉市場准入的必需輸入（儘管良好的物質管控在商業上仍有用）。

standards_or_laws: China RoHS — Administrative Measures on the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products; GB/T 26572 limits; GB/T 39560 test series; Hazardous Substances Disclosure Table
CCC holder / domestic manufacturer — responsible party for the Chinese market

gap.en: This row is largely a relief-of-burden plus one hard requirement. Hard requirement: the exporter must secure a legally established Angolan importer of record before shipping; without one, the goods cannot be lawfully placed on the market or pass import conformity inspection, regardless of how good the product file is. Relief of burden: because Angola has no EU-style RoHS, batteries, or outdoor-noise horizontal regimes for household refrigerators, the exporter does NOT need to build Angola-specific RoHS substance declarations, EU-style battery conformity, or outdoor-noise (LWA) labelling to enter Angola — these EU gates simply do not apply. Caution: this is a current-state observation, not a guarantee; Angola's regulatory framework is evolving, and substance/environmental rules could be introduced or applied via general legislation. The exporter should still (a) appoint the importer, (b) provide Portuguese documentation and IEC-based conformity evidence, and (c) ask IANORQ/the importer whether any product-specific environmental or substance requirement has been introduced for refrigerators since this comparison was prepared.
gap.zh: 本行主要是负担减免加一项硬性要求。硬性要求：出口商须在装运前确定合法设立的安哥拉进口记录方；若无，无论产品档案多完善，货物均不能合法投放市场或通过进口符合性查验。负担减免：由于安哥拉对家用电冰箱无欧盟式RoHS、电池或户外噪声横向制度，出口商进入安哥拉无需构建安哥拉专属的RoHS物质声明、欧盟式电池合规或户外噪声（LWA）标识——这些欧盟门槛根本不适用。注意：这是当前状态的观察，而非保证；安哥拉监管框架在演变，物质/环境规则可能被引入或通过一般立法适用。出口商仍应（a）委任进口商，（b）提供葡萄牙语文件及基于IEC的符合性证据，（c）询问IANORQ/进口商，自本对照编制以来是否已对电冰箱引入任何产品专项环境或物质要求。
gap.zht: 本行主要是負擔減免加一項硬性要求。硬性要求：出口商須在裝運前確定合法設立的安哥拉進口記錄方；若無，無論產品檔案多完善，貨物均不能合法投放市場或通過進口符合性查驗。負擔減免：由於安哥拉對家用電冰箱無歐盟式RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲橫向制度，出口商進入安哥拉無需構建安哥拉專屬的RoHS物質聲明、歐盟式電池合規或戶外噪聲（LWA）標識——這些歐盟門檻根本不適用。注意：這是當前狀態的觀察，而非保證；安哥拉監管框架在演變，物質/環境規則可能被引入或通過一般立法適用。出口商仍應（a）委任進口商，（b）提供葡萄牙語文件及基於IEC的符合性證據，（c）詢問IANORQ/進口商，自本對照編製以來是否已對電冰箱引入任何產品專項環境或物質要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mixed — a legally established Angolan importer of record is mandatory before market placement; by contrast, EU-style horizontal RoHS / battery / outdoor-noise regimes do NOT apply to household refrigerators in Angola (current-state; verify with IANORQ)
mandatory_status.cn: China operates its own horizontal regimes (China RoHS, battery rules); the CCC holder / domestic manufacturer is the responsible party — none of these create an Angolan obligation

source.publisher: IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade) — Angola standards body (ISO member profile); importer-of-record and absence of horizontal regimes to verify with IANORQ and importer

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Two points: (1) a legally established Angolan importer of record is mandatory — there is no foreign self-declaration route and no EPREL-style registry; (2) Angola does not apply EU-style horizontal RoHS, batteries, or outdoor-noise regimes to household refrigerators, so those EU gates do not apply here — a genuine reduction in burden versus an EU route. This reflects the current state and is not a guarantee; confirm with IANORQ and the importer whether any new substance/environmental requirement has since been introduced.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 两点：（1）须有合法设立的安哥拉进口记录方——无境外自我声明路径，无EPREL式注册库；（2）安哥拉不对家用电冰箱实行欧盟式横向RoHS、电池或户外噪声制度，故这些欧盟门槛在此不适用——相对欧盟路径确属负担减轻。此为当前状态，非保证；请向IANORQ及进口商确认此后是否已引入任何新的物质/环境要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 兩點：（1）須有合法設立的安哥拉進口記錄方——無境外自我聲明路徑，無EPREL式註冊庫；（2）安哥拉不對家用電冰箱實行歐盟式橫向RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲制度，故這些歐盟門檻在此不適用——相對歐盟路徑確屬負擔減輕。此為當前狀態，非保證；請向IANORQ及進口商確認此後是否已引入任何新的物質/環境要求。
